top_signals.title: Stocks Extend Drop Before Nvidia, Bonds Hold Loss: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Global equities headed for their longest losing streak in more than two months as mounting inflation concerns drove bond yields higher, pressuring stocks and prompting investors to rethink valuations after a record-breaking rally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
